acceptance.assertion: A first-class supported session escalation can authorize worktree-hygiene-reconcile without bypassing the trusted-owner profile gate, and the authorization is receipt-bound.
A live canary runs worktree-hygiene-reconcile with max_actions=1 and apply_cleanup=false against /home/alex/repos/grabowski, producing a passed receipt or an explicit no-eligible-action result.
The canary does not remove any worktree or branch; any mutation is limited to recovery-first archival of at most one exactly merge-proven terminal checkout.
Post-canary inventory and lifecycle readback identify the exact affected checkout, archive evidence if any, and prove dirty, coordinated, foreign-owned and ambiguous worktrees remained untouched.

approval.note: High-risk live reconciliation must use an explicit supported session escalation; bypassing the profile gate is prohibited.

goal: Provide a supported explicit session-escalation path for the high-risk worktree-hygiene-reconcile grip and execute one bounded live canary without deleting any worktree, proving the deployed reconciliation contract end to end.

metadata.live_basis: Deployed runtime cb9b942 exposes worktree-hygiene-reconcile, but the current operator session received blocked preflight receipt 08a8e1134dc593c8d9fa959466b6432f972019b87c9e618609dcf5b1f80db5fe because grip_run cannot provide the required session_escalation.

title: Run an explicitly elevated live worktree-hygiene canary
